verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Tomorrow mornin' if you wake up And the sun does not appear I… I will be here If in the dark we lose sight of love Hold my hand and have no fear 'Cause I… I will be here I will be here When you feel like bein' quiet When you need to speak your mind I will listen

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I will be here When the laughter turns to cryin' Through the winnin' and losin' and tryin' We'll be together 'Cause I will be here

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Tomorrow mornin' if you wake up And the future is unclear I… I'll be here Just as sure as seasons are made for change Our lifetimes are made for years I… I will be here

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will be here You can cry on my shoulder When the mirror tells us we're older I will hold you

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And I will be here To watch you grow in beauty And tell you all the things you are to me I will be here

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I will be true To the promise I have made To you and to the One who gave you to me

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: And just as sure as seasons are made for change Our lifetimes are made for years 'Cause I… I will be here…. We'll be together, forever

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: 'Cause I will be here I will be here
